scope: The spec map requirement × repo coverage matrix. Belongs here: the matrix rows; the src / test / src+test / — rendering; the future webapp matrix-view requirements. Does not belong here: FTS retrieval (→ QURY). Boundary case: MAP stays a separate domain rather than folding into a generic read domain because it will accrue the webapp matrix-view requirements.

requirements.statement: spec map renders the cross-repo requirement-to-repo coverage matrix derived from tags, with per-cell src/test/src+test states.
requirements.why: The platform coverage view a single-repo scan cannot give.
